reviews.review_description:
I've played the free trial till 8 minutes remaining then uninstalled it.
Now in the sale I bought it for 16.99€ and after 10 minutes it said free trial has ended and I can't start it anymore. 
Good game I'll try play it later or tomorrow if it works I'll change the review for now 2 stars because it's normally good. 
Müsst ihr wissen (German)
UPDATE!: 
It works and it is AMAZING 😍🤩 
Played 2 "real" (some AI's) and won BOTH! 
Best game ever!

This game is simply incredible to play. 6 mechs all with their own special abilities, tons of weapons, tons of maps, and it has great replayability. Really balanced and the community is great as well. Seriously would reccomend, the devs put a lot of time and effort into this game :)

Game looks great but please please add a singleplayer campaign mode or to play co-op with known friends in a story against AI. I really hate multiplayer only games because it's just a matter of time when it gets frustrating to deal with strangers. Check other titles they all failed after some time.

reviews.review_title: Get the game it's a must play
reviews.review_description: Good with friends not really too good with randoms but overall amazing do not play standing up play sitting down very good very immersive and I love this game there is only one thing that I can make it better better load times

The graphics are terrible. I keep glitching through the map and also I tried to refund it. It said I had the game for 14 days when I bought it 20 minutes ago do not buy this. It’s a waste. 
￼

developer_response.body:
Hey there, we're sorry that your experience did not go as planned. We have not had others who have had the same issue so we're not sure exactly what happened. If you'd like, you can join our Discord to troubleshoot and we'd be happy to support.

As for the refund, have you reached out to Meta directly? That part is outside of our control.

reviews.review_description:
This game needs 2 things to be the perfect game.

Snap turning to broaden the amount of people that can actually play it.

Offline mode for the people who want to own their game and don't want this to turn into another anthem.

Could’ve been a great game but there’s a core group of vets that know all the bugs and exploits. They refuse to accept this is a problem. Either use the meta builds and hide or get completely demolished before you even figure out how to operate your mech. Devs allow this so there’s no hope for a change.
The mech and weapons give so much free will to people and the ablitys are very good for battle all it needs is a campain game mode

reviews.review_title: Own on steamvr and here needs campaign
reviews.review_description:
Played on pc and wanted when I travel to still have this game so bought twice :-)

Agree with others it needs a single player campaign and perhaps more clarity you are in a solo private match with AI ——- couple of training missions I got smashed by a much better player that got on the other AI team somehow so was frustrating experience ——— heavy mech with better weapons and upgrade

But else if you like real physical interaction and a great combat game this is awesome —- no motion sickness either

reviews.review_title: Awesome but needs a " Campaign Mode"
reviews.review_description:
By far one of my favorites VR Game of all time. The key missing features is a Campaign mode with the ability to play single or Co-op.

 Please, if you love the game and feel the same: comment " Campaign mode needed" so we can catch the developers attention to it.

reviews.review_title: This is VR at its finest!!!
reviews.review_description: I have played a ton of games of every style shape and color but was looking for that full immersion feel and this is it! The mechanics are smooth and fairly easy to learn and once you are strapped into a giant mechanical marvel you really get the sense of being there. This game is more than a game it’s an experience and the amount of content there is makes it top notch. Iron Rebellion is a must have for your gaming catalog don’t think twice, jump in, fire up your mech and rock and roll…..Enjoy and Deploy!
I really like being inside a robot. There are so many weapon combinations to use, and the fact that every single button in the cockpit has a purpose is great.👌

This game is amazing, but sadly lacking. Nonetheless its an amazing game and I highly recommend it to anyone who loves giant mech games. As to what its lacking, is simple, a campaign. For a game as great as this, the only thing I wish for the campaign is for it to have a great story, and lengthy. I wouldn't even be mad if they ripped the story straight outa titanfall 2, hell I'd love it more

reviews.review_title: A life experience, not just a vr game
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing vr for 10 years

You haven't played a thing like this. 

Even the tutorial and the boot up process is in world.  And everything feels perfect. 

Play it 10 min.  It's worth the price of that was all you needed even played.  The tutorial missions are that cool.

reviews.review_title: Good at what it wanted to do
reviews.review_description: The live cockpit was a cool concept but I've been having a lot of issues with the game right out of the gate on (quest 3 for reference) the height never really seems to be just right always slighty to tall after readjusting controllers kept desyncing and only the grip would work couldn't use sticks or flip switches till I manually reset my controllers the ai in this game is ridiculously op sometimes a light mech will eat all your shots I was using the spit fire and rocket pod hit every shot with 2 mags of each got blown up and it wasnt even on fire or smoking and the ai having perfect accuracy just kinda killed it for me after that damage I can chalk up to a bad connection or server issue but getting sniped by things I cant see for most of my mechs health and the radar never displaying the bot mechs just made me give up maybe I'm just not good at the game or not understanding it but between the inconsistent functionality and things in the cockpit either not working at all or getting in the way of something else it just became a huge pain and lost all the fun I was having for the first hour

I have to be honest, I thought I loved mech games but... I don't think I do. 
It's a great game. I think it wants to do more than the quest can offer right now. Don't get me wrong it looks great but it's not as quite as solid as something like Vox M, But it's getting there. 

sad thing is I've been with this game since day one on and off. 
I just suck lol I thought I was getting like mad kills but my score reflected zero???!!! (I know that can't be true I watched machines blow up in front of me) 
nah I'm good. obviously there is too big of an experience gap. I mean I thought I was having fun, but when my score says I got zero kills... That's just BS.
I love this game because of its cockpit features, devs, if your reading this, can you add a mode that has over 10 startup switches plz? It would be much funner for me and others (maybe) if you add it

reviews.review_title: If you think you will enjoy you will
reviews.review_description: If your looking at this and thinking its your type of thing its more than 100% worth a go
STANDBY FOR TITANFALL 🔥

reviews.review_title: Solid beta experience for all VR users
reviews.review_description: It is obvious when Developers love theire created experience. They know they have sufficient in beta value to charge for it. The feeling is the you are piloting something destructive, hunting and being hunted. You are in full control of this heavy devastating machine with the capacity to unload and Destroy other machines. The player versus player is fun it'll give you an opportunity to match with anybody who else who's online at the time. Even in what would be the middle of the night I've never had to wait longer than a 2 minutes. There are people in and out of the lobby all the time and remember that is a free-for-all. So sometimes when you get into the lobby it'll be off the chain with 10 15 20 players just going at each other. Just pure rock and awesomeness. Most the time players are in the death zone, or playing the Mech version of rugby. One additional piece of advice play in a chair that has armrest, with sufficient room around you to swing your arms from the elbow.

Edit: 10/18/25
I have been playing this game since it came out and have been enjoying it up until now. Originally 5 stars taken down to 2. Why? The time it takes to load into and out of matches takes ridiculously long. Respawn times also take a long time.  The game also crashes frequently. Im using MQ3. The other bigger reason is HACKERS. They are rather easy to spot and i do not see a report button. I have had hackers see my stealthed bot even when i stand completely still and i am far away. They also have some sort of aim assist and damage boosters. There is no way a normal player can zap my bot to death in 2 seconds and hit it 100% of the time while im running circles around the bot with a light mech. It even seems as if the hacker is firing the lasers or weapons of any sort of weapon out of its rear end. I have even witness hackers instantly repair their bot while moving. For now i will take a break from this game. If the developers deal with the hackers and bugs i will put it back to 5 star. If you do not mind hackers and the slow loading bugs have at it. 

Original post: 
I got this game a while ago, and it has been worth every penny. Great graphics. Great gameplay.  Mostly mature players online. Creators are still adding new stuff. It doesn't cause me motion sickness like other fast-paced action shooter games. Very competative Customizable and fun game. No pay to win. No monthly fees.
Great game, just wish there was a story line or something to follow.
Mech battles are great.  Needs campaign option.
Needs a campaign mode also more customizable mechs and crafting weapons
It just needs a campaign. ￼

One of my favorite games amazing only problem is there is a bit of a long loading time but that might just be my wifi and the fact that I'm playing off of a quest 2 also yeah you should add a campaign mode

I thought that it would be the worst mesh game, but when I tried it I was amazed!!! It has crazy graphics and details, and there’s so many things to unlock like guns and different mechs! I recommend this game to all mech game lovers!

Pros: Amazing Graphics
Cons: Guessing game of how to get things accomplished & constant death

The gameplay is rewarding each class feels different customization from pain to augments and wepons feels rewarding to explore new build you'll get lost in this game for hours the comunitty is one of the most inviting ones somone was giving me tips and awnsering questions I had on wepons while they was on enemy team am exited to see what more the put into this game it is amazing and addicting good work devs 
Am living my lost planet fantasy in vr

I tried a different mech game about two years ago and found it cumbersome and too slow. So when my son gifted me Iron Rebellion, I thought, here we go again. But to my surprise, it’s now my new favorite game—it’s anything but slow!

The controls are intuitive, the movement feels fluid, and the setup is completely up to you. There are plenty of options for customizing your mech: weapons, movement systems, camouflage, and more. You can even tweak your loadout each time before respawning to stay competitive.

It’s simple to learn, and if you’re new to IR, you can even create a match with just bots to practice. The choices are yours for improvement—so come play with us. You won’t regret it!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Without a doubt, this is the best mech game on VR. What I love the most is how consistent the devs are with updates. I jumped back in today after a few months away, and wow — I was blown away by how much the game has been polished. It just keeps getting better and better. Huge respect to the team for keeping it alive and pushing it forward!

reviews.review_title: Wow, what a freaking great surprise
reviews.review_description:
Ok so the other day I decided to pick up Underdogs, had tried the trial a while and liked it, when I went to buy it it was bundled with this game for a decent price, not knowing or seeing anything about this game, I bought the bundle 

I load the game and start up the tutorial and the controls appear and then the view outside the mech, wow, for a stand alone it's beautiful. This little hidden gem is amazing. 

While I am still learning the game, I had to leave this review as I was so happy once I started playing, by far one of the best mech games on the quest and to think, 3 devs. 

Amazing job devs, cannot wait to see what the future holds. 

-jay
From the kind people to insane gameplay graphics and physics it is an easy 5 stars and truly my favorite game to load up and play for hours thank you for such an amazing game, Bravo.
Fun

reviews.review_title: Best VR games I have ever played
reviews.review_description: It is so real that I am sitting in the machine

Im not trying to glaze anything but this game is AWESOME, if you like the titan aspect of titanfall YOU WILL MOST LIKELY ENJOY THIS GAME it throws you into the cockpit of a mech of your playstyle, one think to keep in mind is that players are kinda rare, not that's that an issue there's bots but just a heads up for anyone playing..
Help line is not available, this game will piss off people very soon! I can't play the game properly because the grip setting is stuck, so a make the player look slow and can't go enjoy a good fight!

Battletech and Battleforce in Amiga was my first love.
Mechwarrior PC.
The movie Robot Jox(1989) oh I liked it, I even liked the movie Atlas with JLo.

This game is fun and entertaining, the heavy mechs feel really heavy and the light mechs are fast.
Good balance and fun to play, the players behave and gameplay is good enough. Obviously work in progress.

It's an unpolished gem.
Crossplay between Quest and PCVR is a nice feature.

reviews.review_title: Best game ever Best game ever
reviews.review_description: This is definitely the best game ever the robots ￼ ￼are awesome. There’s so much weapons and perks. It is wild. It is the best thing ever ￼￼

Congrats devs. You gave a grown man that dream come true since the first mech game created, I have wanted this ♥️🤙🏼🤙🏼🤙🏼🫵🏼👍🏼
I clicked four switches in the cockpit during training and had to take a breath because of how real it feels. 
This is the start of an epic adventure and I thank you devs again, for a job well done. Looking forward to your next update 👍🏼

reviews.review_title: Excited for campaign, barley any problem
reviews.review_description: The gameplay mechanics are so good and the more and more you wait the better and better it gets. This game has a great progression system but maybe it should be a little less xp for level ups, but maybe that's just me. There's only a few problems, first there's no single player campaign I've heard that one will be dropping in a future update but for now I'll keep playing multi-player. Another little problem is the amount of players, there's only like a max of 20ish players a day and about 3 weeks ago there was less than 10. Anyways the diversity of the game is great especially with this new update, it added camos and new cockpits the light mechs have an open easy to see out of cockpit while the heavy mechs feel slow and. That's a good thing! This game I great and I would suggest getting it.

I was among the many people who were holding off on this game for a story campaign to be added. After awhile I finally just gave in because I wasn't really playing anything else anymore. Now this is my favorite game! I drop in every evening for an hour or two and sometimes up to three hours on weekends. PvP isn't even my thing. It's the MECHS! I really love just being in the cockpits. All the weapons look and sound incredible. And not just shooting them but, I enjoy being shot by them as well XD They all have unique sounds and effects. Even the sounds they make when they whiz by you are unique to each weapon.This game has done mech battling right.
I started out playing against bots only to get to know all the mechs, weapons, maps and game modes. YES, when playing bots you still gain XP, unlock everything and explore all maps and modes. You can choose the number of bots for each team and their difficulty. 
The community has been great too. Haven't run into any toxicity.
I highly highly recommend!
So, to get a rig with a coffee machine (it's the third one, the first heavy mech), you would need to finish something like 3–4 battles. It's worth it!

Used to love playing this to destress between raids on contractors but I had to take a break for a couple of months because I moved. Tried playing it a couple of times the other day and while recentering works, the height calibration does not and I'm forced to stand up now. And there's no individual setting to do so separately from recentering. I tried reporting the bug on the devs servers and before I could, I noticed there were countless reports going over a wide range of topics to which the response was: " that's metal fault, you're going to have to live with it or switch to pcvr". Not only is that deflection and lazy, but it shows a lack of care to fix simple, yet game trashing bugs. Do better
Love it but can you try to add exiting the mech and making it follow you and fighting outside of it would be cool.
I spent 40 minutes trying to get it to just start and it has nothing but a black screen, or everything loaded in but it never showed anything so I was basically playing blind person simulator.

developer_response.body: Very sorry for the black screen issue. We are pushing a hotfix, should be resolved within the hour.

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite VR experiences.
reviews.review_description: Ever since I played Steel Battalion for the original XBOX, I’ve craved an experience that builds on that “real” feel of piloting a mech. For me, Iron Rebellion is the closest anyone has come to that. I never want to play multiplayer, so having bots is a nice option, but I am mostly eagerly awaiting the promised single player campaign.

It’s an awesome game ￼ it was the first ever mech game that I bought and I love it.  
I can play for hours at a time. it is definitely worth the purchase.  

To developers: the game is already an amazing game. I don’t know how you can make it even better. But if you can you should add the ability to eject from the mech before you die. Like you pull a handle in the top half of the mech detach from the legs and arms and shoots up into the air.
The game does a very good job of making you feel like you're in a cockpit of this massive fighting machine
Not enough players maybe 3 total online at once they need to advertise more

All in all, it is awesome. Graphics are peak. Gameplay is fun. Community chill. There’s many play styles and it is very customizable. All I ask are the following: shoulder weaponry. Like titanfall 2, you should be able to activate a shield or fire missiles. It would be so cool! But all in all, amazing.

reviews.review_title: The Mexh game i always wanted!!
reviews.review_description: I'm a long time fan of mechs and Battletech. The game is made by people that love mechs. There was a time you could buy a pod to get into to have the mech pilot experience,  but it was very expensive and took a lot of room. This game gives you that feeling if not better!

The feel of this game is fantastic. Every different mech feels unique to its own type, and the customization options for camo and weapons gives into plenty of experimentation. Skirting around the battlefield while sending all hell at the enemy feels amazing in vr, the chaos unfolding while playing your objective. My only gripe currently is that you cannot make private lobbies or set pass codes to make sure your friends can all join in, and the AI not really playing the objective, particularly noticeable in the Uplink game mode, where if you arm an objective, they make no mad dash attempt to deactivate it. Honestly, though, those are very minor cons in comparisons to the pros of this game, and for only $24.99, it's definitely a must buy.
Definitely the best vr mech game ive played 100% worth the money and Definitely worth playing

I've only had this game for a day, and this is one of the best VR games by far! Every switch and button inside the mech is interactive, and it feels like you're actually piloting a machine. Great options for customization, awesome graphics, and the game gives you FULL CONTROL of your bot. You are piloting the bot, not playing as the bot like many other games. Overwhelming at first, but within one match or about 30 minutes of playing you learn everything. I've never seen anything like this, and I highly recommend it!

reviews.review_title: Like everyone else says more prayers
reviews.review_description: I’ve purchased this game today on Saturday played it through into Sunday with a couple of American guys okay they run away and carry on playing games we always love a campaign so young baby company make a campaign for this game as an ad or AI would be okay. There ain’t many players so you need to drop the price about £5
Don't sleep on this amazing game that's a highly accessible love letter to mech simulators. Great devs, welcoming community.

This has been the most fun VR Mech Game bar none! It is fulfilling my feral need for a Gundam/Titanfall VR game in the best way!

I have been in this game for a long time, since it was in very early Alpha, and to see the additions they put in the game from different mech weight classes, to loadouts, to Mass loaded Ults, and even the augment system is incredible!!! The Devs pour so much love and passion into this, and even play with the community! talk about player engagement!

i cant wait to see the new additions and improvements they put into the game!
This is the game I've been waiting for I love the anime Gundam shows and this game is perfect for me
There is barely anybody playing, and the few that are have already unlocked all the op weapons and skills; so for new users there is no point in even bothering to play.
The title says it all

This game is amazing some players can be sweaty from time to time but the whole playerbase from what I’ve seen is kind to newcomers. I got underdogs a while back and loved how you were in the actual cockpit of the mech and this game made it look like a child’s game. Overall it’s awesome one thing I would like  to see is when you die and your mech hits the ground it would be nice to hear a crash and see the cockpit shaking around.

This is one I've been playing a lot. You're in an interactive cockpit. The controls feel great to me. It is a game of skill, teamwork, and strategy. As  you unlock augmentations. weapons, and mechs, you are able to experiment with different configurations. You will find setups that you like for certain maps. Perhaps you like speed and find yourself mastering the light mech? Or you become adept at placing turrets and providing reinforcement for your team in the Heavy Mech? There is a loyal group of players that are always willing to help new players learn the ropes. I enjoy the overal maturity and laidback attitude of the playerbase. Some reviews complain of a lack of lobbies. There are often plenty of lobbies in the evenings and I've been seeing more new players each week. The developers have a lot of exciting updates on the roadmap. The more of us that play, the more it helps the development of this already awesome game. This is on my recommendation list for any VR gamer that loves Mech games. I hope I see you soon Pilot!

I have always been a lover of the pilot/mech genre!  When I saw this game, I was super excited!  After I played the tutorial, I was beside myself with anticipation!  But I mistakenly bought the game thinking there was a single player campaign. And I was heartbroken to see that it was multiplayer only… no one’s fault but mine for overlooking that. 

But developers, some of us don’t do multiplayer, and are denied the pleasure of being able to play such a great game as a result of that. PLEASE, for the love of all things good, make a single player campaign that us non-multiplayer gamers can enjoy. The game is outstanding (at least from what I saw in the tutorial), let the rest of us enjoy it, too. Thank you!

This is mech combat. Step into the cockpit of an iron beast and conquer your foes. Level up to unlock the baddest machines of war the galaxy has ever known. Unlock weapons, perks, camos and more. Lots of maps to war upon from Moon bases to urban combat. Team Deathmatch never felt so awesome.

This is a great game! However,  I'm asking for a refund. I have absolutely no desire to hop right into multi-player just to get put down instantly again & again.. if only there was an option to train with bots... I mean a cupla times I got hit like 3 times..DEAD! Other times, there was no evading the enemy.  Just hit me shot after shot until I was dead. Others have just been at it too long to compete. No fun whatsoever.. 😪

developer_response.body: If you host a match you can set custom slots on and set the opposing side to bots only. Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Love the graphic and how the fps works!!!!!!!! Please add arms i want a close combat feature

A perfect balance of a simulator and a shooter. Truly feels like controlling a real mech suit. With the in game chat you can find most players willing to share tips or just chat. This game fills the void that Titan Fall left.

reviews.review_title: This is the mech game to get.
reviews.review_description: fulfills my twisted metal fantasy. ￼
How to start a match i only see the lobby? Please respond ASAP. Thank  you
All I want are more mechs

reviews.review_title: Ngl it kinda feels like tittenfall
reviews.review_description: Reason I say it feel like titten fall is because you are in a big mech and it’s very fun, the small community is chill, still needs more plays but that happens over time, So mostly Very good game and fun community, community pretty helpful, I hope this game keeps growing 🫡 and I’m gonna enjoy every second of it, while getting shot at and pressung mutiple buttons in panic 💀😭.

reviews.review_title: OG XBOX Live/Mech Assault Day player
reviews.review_description: This is absolutely awesome!.  I bought Mech Assault, same day Xbox live, went live on Nov 15th 2002.  Never thought i'd get to play a game where my gaming/office chair is my mech.  Being able to adjust the height of in-game controls to where the chair armrests are is very rad to me. Makes it more seamless. Quest 3 is my 1st VR headset, but I bought a lot of games BF2024 ha.  This one has turned out to be more fun than I thought it was going to be, the controls are intuitive and makes games very immersive + ctrl height of mech joysticks is cool. Late to the party but glad I finally got here ha.

reviews.review_title: Super fun game. Perfect for VR.
reviews.review_description:
I will start of by saying this game is what I was anticipating, Just a really fun mech pilot game. I haven’t played a ton yet but the game does a very good job of giving you unlocks pretty quickly. 

The controls are super intuitive and responsive. Much more simple than I anticipated and I say that as a compliment. The fact such a small team put this game together is a testament to the talent of the people involved. 

Really the only negative I can come up with is that there is currently no real single player (you can play with bots) and there aren’t many lobbies that are full. 

Part of the reason I am leaving a review is to tell people on the fence (like me) that the game is 100% worth the price of admission. I’d love to get the word out so more people join the fight.

This game is genuinely awesome. The movement controls are great, plenty of tutorials to help you out, the maps are great, the immersion is absolutely awesome just.. EVERYTHING feels great, super hyped for more updates and the community is super chill!

The game is beautiful....you did a great job. there is a problem though.....the volume (all audio volumes) is very low. Honestly shooting or moving and hearing such a low volume is frustrating. We need to hear the audio volume of the shots and of the whole game well to have satisfaction.

Phenomenal game, excellent community. 
Fun fast and exciting matches, 

It is early in development but a full featured release in its own right. Under further development from amazing developers that absolutely care about the game and their community. 

I have hundreds of hours in this game, and met some of the best gamers I have ever had the pleasure to play with and against. 

I absolutely hope the Dev team can push this game to it's full potential, but it needs our support.


Every penny is worth it for this game. 

See you on the battlefield.
OOOOOOOOO MY GOD what the minds of two people can create and for that YOU GUYS 😭 ARE FREAKING ALSOME I feel like a little kid with all the money in the wold

This game is incredible. What a great feeling controlling and operating your very own mech. Easy to operate challenging to master. 
Good games modes and good mechs and mods. 
This game has a variety of maps to play. 
Lobbies aren't super plentiful but jump in with a freind load up with some bots people will join. Bots are hard enough. 
Hopefully this game can recieve more attention and get a fan base so it could be developed more. 
But what a great experience!!
A nice refresher from playing showdown
Easily the best VR Mech PVP game on the market. Get it!
